name: Kochobo's Hinamatsuri
name_jp: こちょぼの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>人形祀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひんなまつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>り
desc: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 Machine monster on the field; for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Xyz Monsters, also Special Summon this card (but banish it when it leaves the field), and if you do, halve that monster's ATK, also this card's Level becomes that monster's. You can only use this effect of "Kochobo's Hinamatsuri" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 Machine monster on the field; for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Xyz Monsters, also Special Summon this card (but banish it when it leaves the field), and if you do, halve that monster's ATK, also this card's Level becomes that monster's. You can only use this effect of "Kochobo's Hinamatsuri" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 Machine monster on the field; for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Xyz Monsters, also Special Summon this card (but banish it when it leaves the field), and if you do, halve that monster's ATK, also this card's Level becomes that monster's. You can only use this effect of "Kochobo's Hinamatsuri" once per turn.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
